title: Essentials-Style Buttons
description: Converts Minecraft buttons in to the Essential-Mod Style
body:
Hiya!

This is a simple retexture of the mincraft buttons to match the colour scheme of the Essentials mod.

Although this resourcepack is marked for use with 1.19 - 1.19.2, it should probably still work with all versions that the mod supports.

It does not include Realms or other GUI change such as inventories, if there is demand, I may look into it c:
